description: A declaration that a translation, verification, or adapter is wanted, with terms. Per P5, the project does not intermediate fulfillment: payment, review, and acceptance happen on external rails referenced here.

main.description: A request primitive. Someone states what they want (a lens, a verification, an adapter) and the terms under which they will consider it delivered; fulfillment is resolved off-substrate.

wants.description: What is being requested. Exactly one of: a lens between two schemas, a verification of a lens, or an adapter for a framework.

constraints.description: Free-text constraints: performance targets, conformance requirements, licensing, deadlines.

reward.description: Free-form reward terms. The bounty record does not transact; it references external rails.

externalRef.description: URL pointing to the rail that handles actual reward (grant portal, payment platform, attestation service).

eligibility.description: Who may claim this bounty. Free text; enforcement is off-substrate.

fulfillment.description: Once fulfilled, points to the deliverable record (lens, verification, or adapter).

status.description: Current lifecycle state as declared by the requester.

bidirectional.description: Whether the requested lens must be invertible.
